name: Landes (France)
description: Quartered: first and fourth blue with three gold fleurs-de-lis, second and third red with a gold lion passant.
history: The arms combine the fleurs-de-lis of France with the gold leopard of the duchy of Guyenne, the historic lordships of the area.

features.role: three fleurs-de-lis in each blue quarter
gold lion passant in each red quarter
